{{- /* Inline tooltip (CSS-only: shows on hover and keyboard focus, no JS). {{< tooltip text="Command-line interface" >}}CLI{{< /tooltip >}} {{< tooltip "Command-line interface" >}}CLI{{< /tooltip >}} (positional) {{< tooltip term="TOML" >}}TOML{{< /tooltip >}} (data/tooltips) The wrapped text (.Inner) is what's shown; the tip is the bubble. `term` looks the tip up in data/tooltips.{toml,yaml,json} so definitions are reusable. */ -}} {{- $tip := "" -}} {{- $term := "" -}} {{- if .IsNamedParams -}} {{- $tip = .Get "text" | default (.Get "tip") -}} {{- $term = .Get "term" -}} {{- else -}} {{- $tip = .Get 0 -}} {{- end -}} {{- with $term -}} {{- $found := index (hugo.Data.tooltips | default dict) . -}} {{- if $found }}{{ $tip = $found }}{{ else }}{{ errorf "tooltip: term %q not found in data/tooltips (page %s)" . $.Page.File.Path }}{{ end -}} {{- end -}} {{- if not $tip }}{{ errorf "tooltip: provide text=\"…\" or a known term= (page %s)" .Page.File.Path }}{{ end -}} {{- "" -}}{{ .Inner }}{{ $tip }}
